title: Multiple Choice Assessment
description: A quiz-based assessment with multiple choice questions. These are defined inline in chapter.yml files within the multipleChoiceAssessments array. Unlike interactive assessments, multiple choice assessments have their description field inline in YAML (no separate description.md file).

index.description: Sequential index within the multipleChoiceAssessments array (0-based). Auto-generated by tpm build if not provided.

code.description: Unique identifier for this quiz assessment. Can be UUID format or semantic string (e.g., 'p2p-insights-fundamentals-quiz').

title.description: Display name for the quiz shown in the UI.

description.description: Overview of what the quiz covers. EXCEPTION: Unlike other entities, this field is allowed inline in YAML since quizzes are fully inline entities with no separate directory.

passingScore.description: Minimum percentage score (0-100) required to pass the quiz.

questions.description: Array of quiz questions. Must have at least one question.

video.description: Optional URL to a video resource providing quiz guidance or context.
